stories.title: Police renew appeal over Buckley electric motorbike robbery after two arrests
stories.summary: North Wales Police are renewing an appeal for information following a robbery in Buckley last month in which a victim was forced off an electric motorbike. The incident happened at around 5.30pm on 18 March 2026 in the Linthorpe Road area of Buckley. The victim was forced from their electric motorbike by two people riding

stories.title: Appeal to find missing Wirral man with links to Chester and north Wales
stories.summary: Merseyside Police are appealing for help to find Gary Davies, 58, who has been missing since around 8.15am on Saturday 18 April and has links to Chester and Porthmadog in north Wales. stories.title: Multi-agency response at Greenfield Docks after person enters water
stories.summary: A person was found safe at Greenfield Docks  this morning after entering the water, with coastguard, RNLI, North Wales Police and ambulance all attending following a call from a member of the public. North Wales Police said the person was located and is “now safe and receiving the help they need.” Officers said the incident

stories.title: Buckley Cemetery gets Flintshire’s first above-ground memorial structure for cremated remains
stories.summary: Flintshire County Council has completed the installation of the county’s first columbarium, a structure providing above-ground storage niches for cremated remains, at Buckley Cemetery. The granite structure has 36 individual niches, each able to hold two sets of cremated remains. Families can choose a personalised inscription on the plaque at the front of each niche.

stories.title: Toyota Deeside Engine Plant charity fund backs St John Ambulance Cymru for second year
stories.summary: St John Ambulance Cymru is to receive £3,000 from the Toyota Manufacturing UK Charitable Trust to fund equipment for volunteers operating across Deeside and North Wales.
